name: Improper Neutralization of Equivalent Special Elements
description: The product correctly neutralizes certain special characters but fails to account for alternate encodings or equivalent representations (Unicode, URL-encoding, HTML entities, double-encoding) that have the same semantic meaning, allowing attackers to bypass input filters.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides data with alternate-encoded special elements that bypasses a CONTROL[input_filter] because the filter only checks one encoding form, while the downstream EXTERNAL or EGRESS component decodes the alternate representation and interprets the special elements
